columns.name: cost_category
columns.resolved_expression: CASE WHEN TOTAL_CHARGES <= 5000 THEN 'Low' WHEN TOTAL_CHARGES <= 20000 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END
columns.direct_expression: CASE WHEN TOTAL_CHARGES <= 5000 THEN 'Low' WHEN TOTAL_CHARGES <= 20000 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END AS cost_category
